[𡿧]
Pictogram ( 象形 ): a flood. One of the original forms of 災 ( OC *ʔslɯː ).

[災]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , *tsˤə;tsˤəh ): phonetic 𡿧 ( zāi , “ flood calamity ” ) + semantic 火 ( “ fire ” ) .
From 𡿧 , an oracle-bone graph of three zigzag strokes depicting flowing water; forms with a horizontal stroke phoneticize the middle stroke as 才 ( OC *dzˤə ). [ 1 ]

[灾]
Ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): 宀 ( “ house ” ) + 火 ( “ fire ” ) — a burning house. One of the original forms of 災 ( OC *ʔslɯː , “disaster”).
